title: Phenol extraction of Chlorella cells
steps: Suspend in 15 ml of liquid phenol.
Add about 0.2ml 5% cetylpyridium chloride (cationic detergent) to facilitate chlorophyll extraction.
Shake suspension until green has been extracted from cells.
Centrifuge and wash pellet with aqueous buffer. Pellet will be difficult to resuspend.
Wash pellet about 5x. Pellet will become easier to resuspend after the first wash.
Use your nose as a guide to removal of phenol. If need be a UV spectrum of the final wash supernatant can be used to assure absence of phenol.
creator: Irina Agarkova
